steps: Read all design decisions in reasoning[] to understand constraints before proposing any changes.
Confirm the application profile exists under application-profiles/ — if not, the onboard-application operation must be completed first.
Collect from the user: subscription ID, app name, environment name, and CIDR block.
Generate the bicepparam file at landing-zones/oases-prod/{app}/{env}.bicepparam following the landing-zone-workflow-prefix-contract.
Present a complete draft before implementing.
